subject: An imperious noblewoman seated on an elevated throne in a dim hall, with a smaller robed attendant or servant scrubbing the floor at the base of the dais
description: A stately noblewoman sits upright on a high-backed throne atop a stepped dais, draped in a long pale gown with dark trim. Her posture is rigid, regal, and condescending. Light streams in from arched windows behind and around her, throwing the throne into silhouette and rim-lighting her figure. At the foot of the dais a hunched, hooded servant kneels on the floor, scrubbing the stones. The architecture is gothic and arched; the palette is dominated by deep blacks, warm browns, and a desaturated pale highlight on the noble figure. The mood is cold, hierarchical, and quietly menacing.
foreground: Hooded servant kneeling and scrubbing the stone floor at the base of a dais
background: Gothic throne room with arched windows, an elevated throne, and a noblewoman seated upon it lit from behind
emotion: Noblewoman: cold, imperious, looking down. Servant: subjugated, head bowed, body language of forced labor.
